summary: Core policy logic is well-tested (max_age, keep_latest_n, max_total_size, combinations), with good fixtures and deterministic tests. However, significant gaps exist: (1) No CLI integration tests in test_artifact_cleanup.py—argparse, main(), file I/O, error handling are untested; (2) Error scenarios untested—invalid JSON, missing files, malformed dates, invalid artifact records all have error handling code but no tests; (3) Edge cases missing—empty artifact lists, zero-sized artifacts, identical creation dates, artifacts created in future; (4) run_act_tests.py only tests ONE scenario (max_age dry-run) despite the task requiring comprehensive workflow testing; (5) Brittle string-matching assertions in act tests ('30 passed', exact space values). The suite would catch regressions in policy logic but miss CLI bugs, error-handling failures, and integration issues. Claims TDD methodology but error paths exist without corresponding tests.
